## PiPipeConfig.wsPrefix property

Prefix reserved for built-in WebSocket routes such as `/ws/pi`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly wsPrefix: string;
```

## Default Value

`"/ws"` when loaded via `loadConfig()`
